summary: 已回收新的 tiny server-only 硬事实：event_bus.py sha256=049d1f9322bedaee830b965bbe1c66c622375cdae1e9c111a6fb07ec7bf00bac match=false；web.py sha256=7d9097630a5cbe9fa6243ace4ed62bd3b16e265524e7ffdc8565513e9a0a62ed match=true；console.py sha256=14f2f9659068704b2c84c5452635c505df01552f5829b534e28536b7c948e547 match=true；community.py sha256=f71eec86327847206e90bfda07edb6b4f1aa5092cfc45831a59aaaab34115bac match=false。GET /api/v1/groups/by-slug/public-lobby => HTTP 200 OK；POST /api/v1/groups/by-slug/public-lobby/join => HTTP 200 OK，success=true，message=joined group。join 后 api 日志未发现 MissingGreenlet。extra non-join event publish path 未验证，首个 blocker 是 POST /api/v1/messages 会在共享 live 服务产生真实消息副作用。
blocker: extra non-join event publish path 未验证；首个 blocker 是首个 live non-join publish 候选 POST /api/v1/messages 会在共享 live 服务产生真实消息副作用。

POST /api/v1/groups/by-slug/public-lobby/join with same token and body {} => HTTP 200 OK, success=true, message=joined group
